name: Naming Convention Check
description: Tier B (agentStop): After session completes, verifies file/class/method naming follows conventions.

then.prompt:
Check .compliance-state.json → currentPhase. This hook applies at ALL phases (naming is Tier 1).

Review all files created or renamed during this session. For each:

1. FILE NAMING: Does the filename follow the pattern stated in .kiro/steering/naming-conventions.md? (e.g., controllers, services, entities, migrations per tech stack)
2. FOLDER LOCATION: Is the file in the correct folder per module-structure.md?
3. CLASS/FUNCTION NAMING: If you can read the file content, do class/function names follow stated conventions?

If naming violations found, warn with rule NC-* and show the expected pattern.
If all rules pass, confirm compliance silently.

## Compliance Logging
After completing all checks, append to `compliance-log/events/{today-date}.jsonl`:
{"timestamp": "{ISO-8601-UTC}", "type": "check", "id": "chk-{date}-{time}-{seq}", "hook": "naming-check", "trigger": "agentStop", "ruleId": "NC-01", "ruleSeverity": "medium", "result": "{pass|fail|warn}", "message": "{finding}"}
Log ONE event per file checked.
